title: You will never be a witness to Yeshua's words spoken on the Earth when the Word became flesh
author: joshualinog
tags: teach me how to use the Bible
labels: teach me how to use the Bible
excerpt: ## thoughts  - only an authorized memorialization compiled by a witness can do this for a past event - no revelation can constitute this - no revelation can replace this
body:
